changeSet.author: codex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'pago' AND constraint_name = 'chk_pago_destino' AND constraint_type = 'CHECK' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pago DROP CHECK chk_pago_destino;

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE pago ADD CONSTRAINT chk_pago_destino CHECK ( ( venta_id IS NOT NULL AND reserva_id IS NULL AND contrato_plan_ahorro_id IS NULL AND adjudicacion_plan_ahorro_id IS NULL ) OR ( venta_id IS NULL AND reserva_id IS NOT NULL AND contrato_plan_ahorro_id IS NULL AND adjudicacion_plan_ahorro_id IS NULL ) OR ( venta_id IS NULL AND reserva_id IS NULL AND contrato_plan_ahorro_id IS NOT NULL ) );
